name: Transparent pricing - kilo.ai
snippet:
Pricing for Kilo Code, the open-source AI coding agent for VS Code, JetBrains and the CLI
Transparent pricing. Start coding with AI for free. Add credits as you go — no subscription required. Power your AI usage with the Kilo Gateway.

name: GitHub - Kilo-Org/kilocode: Kilo is the all-in-one agentic
snippet: Install the Kilo Code extension from the VS Code Marketplace. Create your account to access 500+ cutting-edge AI models including Gemini 3 Pro, Claude 4.5 Sonnet & Opus, and GPT-5 – with transparent pricing that matches provider rates exactly.

name: Kilo Code - Open‑source AI coding agent | Codnaut
snippet: Kilo offers VS Code and JetBrains extensions plus a CLI, connects to 500+ models through a usage‑based provider where API keys are optional, and supports credits that work across leading models like Gemini 3 Pro, Claude 4.5 Sonnet/Opus, and GPT‑5.

name: Kilo Code Review: Open-Source AI Coding Agent With Zero
snippet: What Is Kilo Code? Kilo Code is an open-source AI coding agent that runs as an extension in VS Code and JetBrains IDEs, plus a standalone CLI tool called Kilo CLI. It was created by forking both Cline (the most popular open-source VS Code coding extension with over 5 million installs) and Roo Code, then merging their best features under a unified platform.
